item.title: China Targets Lawyers Defending Jailed Christian Leaders
item.description: The arrest of pastor Ezra Jin has drawn criticism from Secretary of State Marco Rubio and members of Congress.

item.title: Beijing’s Big Problem: An Incredible Shrinking Economy
item.description: China has taken pride in its explosive growth over the decades. But now, its economy is falling behind because of deflation and a weak currency.

item.title: Tech Exec Accused of Smuggling High-End Nvidia Chips to China
item.description: Super Micro Computer placed two employees on leave and fired a contractor after charges of diverting U.S.-assembled servers to China, violating export control laws.

item.title: Taiwan’s All-Hands-on-Deck Plan to Fend Off China
item.description: A growing cohort of self-defense zealots is embracing a mission to get the island ready for an attack.

item.title: China Isn’t Planning to Invade Taiwan in 2027, U.S. Concludes
item.description: Beijing would prefer to take control of the self-ruled island without resorting to force, according to the U.S. intelligence community.

item.title: China Hoped Trump Summit Would Cement Its Superpower Status. Now Xi Has to Wait.
item.description: President Trump’s postponement of the planned meeting signaled that the U.S. still sets the global agenda, and not Beijing.

item.title: In Delaying China Summit, Trump Faces a Familiar Mideast Distraction
item.description: The war in Iran is the latest example of why several presidents have found it so hard to focus on the U.S.’s most formidable rival.

item.title: Trump Shifts U.S.-China Strategy on Trade to Dealmaking
item.description: Plus, President Trump has asked Beijing to delay his summit with Xi and some have signaled renewed openness to bilateral investment.

item.title: China’s Economy Off to Steady Start in 2026 Amid Lowered Expectations
item.description: A better-than-expected performance in the first two months of the year opens space for Beijing to pursue its goal of shifting toward consumption-led growth.

item.title: The U.S. Navy’s New Insurance Policy for War With China Is an Australian Base
item.description: The Pentagon plans to deploy submarines to an expanding facility in allies’ strategy to deter Beijing.

item.title: U.S. Builds Tech Bloc to Counter China, Adds India as Newest Member
item.description: With Pax Silica, the Trump administration is retreating from an adversarial stance it took toward allies and friends last year.

item.title: How China Is Quietly Helping an Isolated Iran Survive
item.description: From buying oil to selling rocket parts, these are some of the ways China is giving Iran critical support.
